description_long: A small pyramid-shaped stack of gold bars is arranged neatly on a dark wooden surface. The bars are rectangular with beveled edges and a rich, metallic yellow color, each one featuring subtle engravings or markings on the top face. The gold bars are stacked in three layers, with the bottom layer consisting of three bars, the middle layer two, and a single bar at the top, forming a compact triangular formation. The surface of the bars is smooth and reflective, catching the light and emphasizing their metallic luster. The wooden base beneath the bars is dark brown with visible grain patterns, providing a contrasting background that enhances the visual prominence of the gold. There are no visible gemstones or additional decorative elements on the bars.
description: A pyramid stack of smooth, reflective gold bars with subtle engravings, arranged on a dark wooden surface.
description_view_0: The gold bars are seen from the side, showing the length of the stack and the layered arrangement on the wooden surface.
description_view_1: A direct front view reveals the triangular pyramid structure of the gold bars, with all three layers clearly visible.
description_view_2: The opposite side view mirrors view 0, displaying the length and layering of the gold bars from the other side.
description_view_3: A rear view similar to the front, showing the pyramid stack of gold bars from the opposite direction.
